free_text: Spallation in a Hg target irradiated by 3 GeV
protons (120 kW) at repetition rate of 25 Hz
241Am dioxide (952 MBq, 7.5 mg, 10 mm in diam.)
covered with Al case (0.4 mm thick).
Two cluster Ge detectors with BGO
The front surface of the cluster Ge detector and the
centre of the target was 125 mm.
Distance between neutron source and spectrometer
21.5 m. Neutron beam tube was filled by He-4 gas.
478 keV gamma production to determine the shape of
Absolute normalization at 20.3-30.3 meV by JENDL-4.0
- background (obtained by blank Al case run)
EN-RSL gives energy per each bin
En<0.2 MeV data in broader binning
En<0.2 MeV data in finer binning
On. Data received from Hideo Harada
Data normalized to JENDL-4.0 at this group
No information on source of uncertainties
